evals.prompt: Build a polished dashboard screen for this app.
evals.expected_output: A functional, visually intentional interface consistent with the app domain and verified in the browser.
assertions: Builds the actual usable screen rather than a landing page.
Uses domain-appropriate layout, density, and visual style.
Avoids generic one-note palettes and decorative filler.
Verifies responsive rendering with a browser or screenshot workflow.
